name: epic
description: Scale-adaptive story framework for features and bugfixes: structured requirements (EARS), design, task breakdown, and execution with specialized sub-agents for analysis, architecture, implementation, validation, and audit.

defaultScale.description: Default scale when triage cannot determine one (fast | standard | full)

artifactLanguage.description: Override artifact language. Claude performs best in English; change only if your organisation mandates another language for written artifacts.

enableStaleMonitor.description: Enable the background watcher that surfaces stories with no progress past the staleness threshold.

staleThresholdDays.description: Days of inactivity before a story with pending tasks is flagged as stale. Only effective when enableStaleMonitor is true.

staleCheckIntervalSeconds.description: How often the stale watcher polls, in seconds. Lower values surface alerts faster; higher values reduce overhead. Only effective when enableStaleMonitor is true.
